creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 186189
Patch to update deskutils/xfce4-xkb-plugin

- Update to 0.8.1
- Adjust dependencies

Note: tested with sysutils/garcon 0.6.1 (as it is ported to Gtk3, it needs at least 0.6.0 or higher).

For committers, I think it's good idea to inform end users (add note in UPDATING file for example), now this plugin (since the 0.8.0 release) uses xfconf to store properties. So .rc file (found in ~/.config/xfce4/panel/) can be safely removed. Therefore it requires manual intervention (previously properties are not retained).

Prefix of .rc file calls 'xkb-plugin-id.rc' (where 'id' is an unique identifiant).
